mainEntity.name: Can I get pain and suffering money for a work lifting injury, or just medical bills?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, workers comp does not pay for pain and suffering. However, it pays for all related medical bills, a portion of lost wages, and impairment benefits if the lifting injury leaves you with permanent physical limitations.
